_generated: Do not edit this file directly. Run generate_registry.py instead.
_validationPolicy: v0.5 (Op-47): Build fails on duplicate codes, missing codes, or malformed entries.

description.en: The Ed25519 signature in the Authorization header is invalid or cannot be verified against the sender's public key in the ION registry.

resolution.en: Verify that you are signing with the private key matching the public key registered for your subscriber_id. Check that the signing string construction follows the ION spec.

description.en: The bap_id or bpp_id in the message context is not found in the ION participant registry.

resolution.en: Ensure your subscriber_id is registered and active on the ION registry. Contact ION network operations if you believe registration is complete.

description.en: The message timestamp plus TTL has elapsed before the message was processed. Maximum TTL is PT30S for most actions.

resolution.en: Ensure your clock is synchronized (NTP). Reduce processing time before sending. Do not reuse messageIds from expired messages.

description.en: A message with this messageId has already been processed within the idempotency window (30 minutes).

resolution.en: Generate a new UUID for each unique message. Never reuse messageIds.

description.en: The domain in context does not match an ION-registered sector domain code.

resolution.en: Use ion:trade for Trade sector. Other valid domains will be listed in the ION registry.

description.en: The catalog payload exceeds the 10MB limit for a single publish_catalog call.

resolution.en: Split catalog into multiple publish_catalog calls by category or provider location. Maximum 10MB per call.

description.en: A resource has an empty or missing images array. At least one image URL is required for all catalog resources.

resolution.en: Provide at least one valid HTTPS image URL in images[]. First image is the primary thumbnail.

description.en: Provider attempting catalog publish or transaction has kycStatus of EXPIRED, SUSPENDED, or REJECTED. Catalog publish and new transactions blocked until KYC is renewed/restored.

resolution.en: Provider must complete KYC renewal. New transactions blocked until kycStatus is APPROVED.

title.en: Listing suspended — counterfeit flag under investigation

description.en: Resource has an active COUNTERFEIT_FLAG raise ticket. Auto-delist applied pending ION Central arbitration. New transactions blocked.

resolution.en: Wait for arbitration resolution. Provider may respond to raise ticket with evidence.

description.en: Provider operating in regulated category (pharmacy, alcohol, tobacco, meat) does not have valid categoryLicenses entry for the required license type.

resolution.en: Upload current license certificate with validUntil in future. Renew via relevant authority (BPOM, Kemendag).

title.id: Policy IRI tidak valid saat publish katalog
title.en: Invalid policy IRI at catalog publish

description.en: Offer declared a policy IRI that is not present in the ION Policy Terms Registry. Every offer.returnPolicy / cancellationPolicy / warrantyPolicy / disputePolicy / grievanceSlaPolicy / paymentTermsPolicy must be a ratified IRI from policies/registry.json.

resolution.en: Check policies/registry.json for the ratified set. Declare only IRIs present in the current registry.

description.en: Offer declared a policy IRI that has been deprecated. The terms document's deprecatedAt field is populated; use the supersededBy IRI instead. Deprecated IRIs remain readable for existing contracts but cannot be used on new catalog publishes.

resolution.en: Replace with the supersededBy IRI from the terms document, or select an alternative from the current registry.

description.en: The resourceId in the select payload does not exist in the current published catalog for this provider.

resolution.en: Refresh catalog from /on_discover before sending /select. Do not cache resource IDs beyond catalog TTL.

description.en: A COMPOSED resource has one or more groups with selectionType=SINGLE_REQUIRED. The select payload is missing a selection for at least one mandatory group.

resolution.en: Ensure your UI enforces SINGLE_REQUIRED groups before allowing /select. Check all customisationGroups where selectionType=SINGLE_REQUIRED and add the missing groupId and optionId.

description.en: A customisation optionId sent in /select does not exist in the catalog for the referenced groupId.

resolution.en: Only send optionIds returned in the customisationGroups of the on_discover catalog. Do not fabricate or guess option IDs.

description.en: The resource has availability.status of OUT_OF_STOCK or DISCONTINUED at the time of select.

resolution.en: Refresh catalog and display current availability status to consumer. Do not allow select on OUT_OF_STOCK or DISCONTINUED items.

title.id: Kuantitas melebihi batas maksimum per pesanan

description.en: The quantity requested in select exceeds the maxOrderQty declared in the resource availability.

resolution.en: Respect maxOrderQty from the availability signal. Display this limit to the consumer before checkout.

title.id: Metode pembayaran tidak tersedia untuk produk ini
title.en: Payment method not available for this product

description.en: The selected payment method is not eligible for this offer. e.g. COD not available (availableOnCod=false) or BNPL not in paymentMethodEligibility.

resolution.en: Check availableOnCod and paymentMethodEligibility from the offer before presenting payment options to consumer.

description.en: The on_select quote and stock reservation has expired. BAP sent /confirm after the BPP's declared reservationWindowSeconds elapsed.

resolution.en: Restart transaction from /select. Stock and pricing must be re-quoted.

description.en: Between on_select and confirm, another transaction exhausted the available stock. Race-condition loser case.

resolution.en: Display out-of-stock message to consumer. Offer alternative products.

description.en: Flash sale or capped offer has been fully claimed. offer.totalStockCap is reached; offer is no longer available.

resolution.en: Inform consumer offer is sold out. Surface standard (non-flash) offer if available.

title.en: COD not eligible for this buyer

description.en: Offer supports COD (availableOnCod=true) but the specific buyer has been declined COD — new buyer, previous COD failure, address not verified, amount exceeds limit, or high-risk category.

resolution.en: Prompt consumer to select prepaid payment method. Display codEligibilityReason.

description.en: Offer is bound to a live session that has ended. Current time is past offer.endAt. Applies to B2C-LIVE spine.

resolution.en: Inform consumer the live offer has ended. Redirect to standard catalog.

description.en: Operator/issuer validation failed for digital goods target. Mobile number inactive, meter number not found, game user ID does not exist.

resolution.en: Prompt consumer to verify target identifier. Return actionable error message.

description.en: Consumer attempted to apply multiple vouchers that violate stacking rules — same stackingGroup or explicit cannotCombineWith.

resolution.en: Display stacking rule violation to consumer. Offer choice of which voucher to keep.

description.en: Consumer selected a combination of axis values that is either not permitted by explicitCombinations or has available=false on an axis value. Applies when resource declares variantMatrix.

resolution.en: Present only valid axis value combinations. Surface available=false values as disabled options.

title.id: Milestone pembayaran gagal atau jatuh tempo
title.en: Payment schedule milestone failed or overdue

description.en: A scheduled payment milestone (down-payment, balance, etc.) failed to collect or is past dueAt + graceDays. Contract cannot progress until milestone is resolved.

resolution.en: Retry collection via /init with fresh payment method, or cancel with appropriate reason.

description.en: GPS coordinates must be in lat,lon format with minimum 4 decimal places. Longitude-first (GeoJSON) is not accepted in context.location.gps.

resolution.en: Format as '-6.261000,106.815000' (lat,lon). Minimum 4 decimal places. Do not swap longitude and latitude.

description.en: The performanceId in a status or track request does not correspond to a known performance record for this contract.

resolution.en: Use performanceId from on_confirm. Multiple performance records may exist (main delivery + return). Reference the correct one.

description.en: The BPP attempted to transition the performance to a state that is not permitted from the current state per the performance-states state machine.

resolution.en: Check the allowed transitions in schema/extensions/trade/performance-states/v1/states.yaml. Cannot skip states or go backwards.

title.id: Pembatalan tidak diizinkan setelah status ini
title.en: Cancellation not allowed after current state

description.en: Buyer attempted to cancel after the performance state has passed the cancellation window declared in the offer's cancellationPolicy.

resolution.en: Enforce cancellation window in BAP UI. Check cancellationFeeApplicableStates — if current state is in this list, fee applies.

title.en: Cancellation reason not accepted by seller

description.en: The cancellation reason code sent is not in the seller's declared cancellationAllowedReasons list.

resolution.en: Only send cancellation reasons that are in the offer's cancellationAllowedReasons. Display these reasons to consumer in the cancellation flow.

title.id: Return tidak dapat dilakukan untuk produk ini
title.en: Return not permitted for this product

description.en: The offer has returnable=false. Return cannot be initiated for this product category.

resolution.en: Check returnable flag before showing return option in BAP UI. Do not present return option if returnable=false.

description.en: The return initiation request was made after the returnWindow duration has elapsed from the DELIVERED timestamp.

resolution.en: Calculate return deadline as deliveredAt + returnWindow ISO 8601 duration. Only show return option within this window.

description.en: Return request does not meet the evidence requirement declared in offer.returnEvidenceRequirement. Missing required photos or video.

resolution.en: Request additional evidence from consumer per returnEvidenceRequirement.

description.en: Return item QC inspection failed — tampered, missing parts, different item, used or damaged. Refund amount reduced or refused per seller policy.

resolution.en: Consumer may escalate via support/raise if they dispute QC finding.

description.en: BPP breached declared SLA. Penalty deduction applied at reconcile time per ION network penalty schedule.

resolution.en: BPP may dispute via raise channel if breach attribution is incorrect.

title.en: Action not permitted by declared policy

description.en: Request attempted an action outside the bounds of the declared policy IRI. Examples: cancelling past cancellationWindowCloses state, returning outside returnWindow, requesting refund when refundAfterQC=false before QC. ION resolves the policy IRI and applies the terms document as enforcement.

resolution.en: Read the policy terms document for the declared IRI. Respect the window/reason/condition constraints it specifies.

description.en: Grievance SLA policy's firstResponseSla or resolutionSla was breached. ION Central has auto-escalated to the next level in the policy's escalationLevels and queued the linked penalty policy for application at reconcile time.

resolution.en: Respond to tickets within declared firstResponseSla. SLA breaches compound - repeat offenders face harsher penalties.

description.en: Delivery agent could not verify buyer age for age-restricted item. Reasons include buyer underage, refused to show ID, no valid ID, or biometric API failure. Delivery fails; RTO initiates.

resolution.en: Initiate RTO flow. Buyer may be restricted from future purchases of this category per platform policy.

description.en: A BAP or BPP processing foreign infrastructure attempted to transact a resource with dataResidency=DOMESTIC_ONLY. Transaction refused. Required for pharmacy, health data, financial services under UU 27/2022.

resolution.en: BAP must confirm domestic-only data processing before attempting these transactions; otherwise filter such resources from discovery.

description.en: The amount declared by BAP in /reconcile does not match the amount expected by BPP based on the confirmed contract quote.

resolution.en: Compare amounts against the confirmed contract quote (locked at on_confirm). If mismatch is due to adjustments, ensure all adjustments are declared in reconAttributes.adjustments[] with references.

description.en: The paymentRail declared in the settlement is not in the ION-supported payment rails list.

resolution.en: Use only payment rails declared in ion.yaml x-ion-settlement.allowedPaymentRails.

description.en: A penalty policy was triggered during the contract lifecycle and has been applied to reconcile. Not an error per se - informational code so BAP and BPP systems can surface the deduction and its reason to operators. Deduction amount and breakdown are in reconcile.amounts.slaPenaltyDeduction and reconcile.amounts.slaPenaltyBreakdown.

resolution.en: Penalized party may dispute via raise channel within 7 days. Dispute goes to marketplace mediation first then BPSK/BANI per disputePolicy.

description.en: In a batch reconcile, the sum of contractDetails amounts does not match the top-level baseContractAmount, or contractIds does not align with contractDetails entries.

resolution.en: Recompute contractDetails; ensure every contractId has a detail entry and sums reconcile.

title.en: Parent reconId not found for adjustment

description.en: An adjustment reconcile references a parentReconId that does not exist in the registry or is outside the valid adjustment window.

resolution.en: Verify parentReconId. If adjustment window has expired, raise a dispute via raise channel instead.

description.en: Reconcile declares taxWithholdings but the corresponding remittance reference (NTPN) or buktiPotongUrl is missing. Required for audit compliance under Indonesian tax law.

resolution.en: Include remittanceRef and buktiPotongUrl for each taxWithholding entry.

description.en: Adjustment of type CLAWBACK attempted more than 90 days after the parent reconcile. Adjustment window closed.

resolution.en: Raise formal dispute via raise channel with type=SETTLEMENT_DISPUTE instead.

title.id: NIB tidak terdaftar atau tidak aktif

description.en: The NIB declared by the BPP is not found in the OSS registry or has been deactivated.

resolution.en: Verify NIB status at oss.go.id. Update nibRegistered to false if NIB is inactive. ION Central validates NIB at catalog publish time.

title.id: Mata uang harus IDR untuk transaksi domestik
title.en: Currency must be IDR for domestic transactions

description.en: The currency field is not IDR. All domestic ION Trade transactions must use IDR.

resolution.en: Set all price.currency and consideration.currency fields to IDR. Cross-border (XB pattern) has a separate currency handling specification.

description.en: A field declared as mandatory (x-ion-mandatory:always) in the schema is absent from the payload.

resolution.en: Check the attributes.yaml for the relevant schema pack. Fields marked x-ion-mandatory:always must always be present. Fields marked conditional require presence when their x-ion-condition is met.

description.en: NPWP must be exactly 16 digits (new format post-2024). Old 15-digit format is not accepted.

resolution.en: Use the 16-digit NPWP format as per PMK 136/2023. Do not include dots or dashes.

title.en: Bahasa Indonesia 'id' field required in localised text

description.en: A LocalisedText object is missing the mandatory 'id' (Bahasa Indonesia) key. ION network policy requires all catalog content to have Bahasa Indonesia text.

resolution.en: Always include 'id' key in all LocalisedText objects with Bahasa Indonesia content. English 'en' is also required for XB (cross-border) pattern.

title.id: Status halal tidak valid untuk produk makanan
title.en: Invalid halal status for food product

description.en: Food and beverage resources must declare halalStatus. The field is absent or has an invalid value.

resolution.en: Declare halalStatus (HALAL/HALAL_PENDING/NON_HALAL) for all food and beverage products. If HALAL, halalCertNumber is required.

description.en: An unexpected error occurred within ION infrastructure. This is not a caller error.

resolution.en: Retry with exponential backoff. If persists beyond 5 minutes, raise an ION-7xxx network ticket.

description.en: The BAP did not receive an on_ callback within the expected TTL window. BPP may have failed to respond.

resolution.en: For /on_confirm timeout: initiate force-cancel flow as per flows/trade/branches/during-transaction/v1. Log incident and consider raising an ION-7xxx ticket if BPP is persistently unresponsive.
